observed_so_far.summary: Opened ~25,020, sold off hard, failed to reclaim overhead, washed into first-hour low ~24,820s, trying reflex bounce into 10:00.

similar_archetypes.name: opening_drive_down_failed_first_reclaim
similar_archetypes.rationale: sharp early liquidation, lower highs, price under falling resistance

similar_archetypes.name: gap_and_trap_bounce_failure
similar_archetypes.rationale: 24,980-25,000 unrecoverable, buyers reactive not in control

similar_archetypes.name: trend_down_then_midday_balance
similar_archetypes.rationale: if 24,820s holds, converts to noon range

predictions.cursor_to_12: relief bounce 24,920-24,970, stall under red resistance, choppy lower-highs not clean reversal
predictions.14_to_16: another downside leg or morning-low retest, presses to fresh lows if sellers hold

tactical_bias.rr_logic: bearish structure + failed opening upside; sell reclaimed resistance for retest 24,820 then 24,780
